sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80022" key="patragaqi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πατρ-ᾰγᾰθία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n80022.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">virtue of one's father</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ancestors</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνδραγαθία</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.183d</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">534c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
